_description: Google GKE module — all backend API success and informational messages. All message strings must originate from this file. Never hardcode success text in route handlers.

config.clusterTestSuccess: Cluster connection test successful. Connected to {clusterName}.
config.clusterTestFailed: Cluster connection test failed. Check your configuration.

poller.started: Cluster poller started. Polling every {interval} seconds.
poller.pollComplete: Poll cycle complete. {healthy} healthy, {unhealthy} unhealthy out of {total} component(s).

data.loaded: Default data loaded successfully. Seeded {tables} table(s), inserted {rows} row(s).
data.reset: Module data deleted. Dropped {dropped} table(s) ({rows} row(s)), {skipped} not found, {errors} error(s).
